long_desc: A hot spiced pie is here.
A strip of silk has been dropped here.
A red bandanna has been left here.
A blue bandanna has been left here.
A burlap sack has been left here.
A length of burlap has been left here.
A dark-looking dagger has been dropped here.
An exquisitely crafted dagger has been left here.
Someone dropped their shades here.
A pair of glasses are here - be careful, don't step on them!
An emerald ring has been left here.
A beautiful gold ring has been dropped here.
A silver ring has been dropped here.
A cup has been left here.
A goblet is here on the ground.
A grail has been left on the ground.
A glowing potion of invisibility
A bright green potion is on the ground.
A potion of cure blindness is fizzing here.

extra_descs.desc:
Strange signs and sigils cover most of it's length - this must be a fearsome
weapon, indeed.

long_desc: A glowing staff lays here.

extra_descs.desc:
It looks quite ridiculous the way it points at the top and has all those
moons and stars all over it, but hey, anything for some mana!

long_desc: A runed hat lies on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
Up and down the lengths of it's blade are strange sigils and signs.  They
must be where the power emanates from.

long_desc: A small glowing sword has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
It seems to be a plain enough dagger, however the glow which radiates it's
length is near blinding.

long_desc: A glowing dagger has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc: You sense something strange about this pile of cloth - almost like energy.

long_desc: A crumpled pile of cloth lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
This wide, purple belt made of velvet feels so soft, so smooth and SO
powerful.

long_desc: A length of cloth lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
They appear to be made of the softest leather, leather that would almost seem
to suck to your feet.  The soles, made of the same leather, are only slightly
more thick from the rest of the boot, but appear to be quite durable.

long_desc: A pair of sneaking boots have been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
It appears that it would cover its wearer completely, obscuring identity and
because of its dark color, enable the wearer to hide well in shadows.

long_desc: A shadowy cloak has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
This hood looks menacing even without being worn by anyone.  It appears to
have been tailor-made for those who deal in the darker trades.

long_desc: A dark hood has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
These gloves, made from a soft, supple leather with the finger tips cut out
were made to serve a thief.

long_desc: A pair of thieven gloves have been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
It appears that when worn, this plate would conceal not only the identity of
the wearer, but also shade the eyes so that others would not be able to discern
which direction the wearer might be looking in.

long_desc: A darkened face plate lies discarded on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The workmanship on this is superb, its carftsman obviously someone who's life
work is creating beautiful wweapons such as this.

long_desc: A strange dirk with a curving blade has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
Up and down its entire length, this small sword, almost small enough to be
called a dagger, glows with its own fierce light.

long_desc: A glowing short sword has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
This thing looks like it could hold enough beer for THREE warriors, but...
It appears that you are meant to drink its contents to the finish.

long_desc: A heavy tankard has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
This is the blade that no warrior should be without...  At least that is the
sales pitch.  It is quite an impressive blade.

long_desc: A small sword with a wolf's head pommel has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
Strange that a sword could be made of gold and still maintain an edge - it
must be magically enhanced.

long_desc: A huge sword made of blazing gold has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
It would take a being of great strength to wield this mighty blade - a being
of great strength, indeed.

long_desc: A huge bastard sword lies on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
They appear big enough to fit the hand of an ogre, but when you try them on
your own hands, they meld into the sahpe of your fist, fitting perfectly!

long_desc: A pair of brass knuckles have been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
Just looking at this fine piece of weapontry makes you want to go thump
someone on the head!

long_desc: A black bola has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
Shot through with metal spikes at the end and heavy as an ogre weapon, this
thing looks as impressive as any club could look.  No wonder they named it
Death.

long_desc: A very huge and very nasty looking club has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
The two horns curve up menacingly, allowing the wearer to use this helm as a
secondary weapon.

long_desc: A huge helm with two bull horns on top has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The power emenating from this huge piece of agate carved into a shield is so
immense that it makes the entire thing glow.

long_desc: A glowing agate shield has been discarded here.

extra_descs.desc: It appears to be in fine shape - a formidable guard against attack.

long_desc: A blackstone buckler has been left on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The insignia of the eagle is bold and bright, making your heart soar and your
spirit long for the din battle to surround you.

long_desc: A chest plate bearing the crest of an eagle has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
They look like any other set of arm guards you have seen in the past - well,
except for the three-inch spikes which protrude from the lower arm area.

long_desc: A set of arm guards have been left here.
short_desc: a set of spiked arm guards

extra_descs.desc:
These gauntlets are made from a sturdy metal and leather combination, with
diamond chips embedded into the knuckles - made to slice into the opponent's
flesh.

long_desc: A pair of gauntlets lie on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
It gently glows, inviting you to pick it up, find some poor innocent slob,
clobber him on the head repeatedly until the blood and brains that ooze from his
head are so thick and juicy that you cannot even make out his features, whether
he was a man, woman, human or ogre it doesn't matter you just want to bludgeon,
kill, mangle, maim!!!!!......  Now where did all that come from?

long_desc: A mace infused with the power of a God has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
It is rumored that every one of Krolar's Holy Sceptres made was forged with a
small piece of the original Sceptre that Krolar used to vanquish the evil Amos
Trask, thief and rogue who plagued the men and creatures of Jareth for nearly a
decade.

long_desc: Someone in their haste has dropped their sceptre.

extra_descs.desc:
Suffused with some unknown God's power, this whip has all the power of a whip
and then some.

long_desc: A whip glowing with energy lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
You see nothing all that special about the amulet, however looks can be
deceiving.

long_desc: A small clear stone on a chain has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
It looks almost too small to be worn at all, but opun trying it on, you see
that it is not too small at all.

long_desc: A small wristlet has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: Red stone inset in a black band - wow, this thing is cool!

long_desc: A small holy, red ring has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: It looks to be in decent enough shape.

long_desc: A yellow robe has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
It is made from some sort of material that makes the color just seem to jump
out at you!

long_desc: A bright robe lies crumpled in a corner.

extra_descs.desc:
An exquisite robe of the finest fabric.  One of the finest pieces of cloth
you have ever seen.  Who in their right mind would sell or leave this thing
unaccounted for must be an absolute idiot.  Why would anyone want to leave this
lovely piece of fabric behind?

long_desc: A beautiful white robe has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The black rose is symbolic of the hatred for all others, the desire to kill
and maim that a Deathknight has breeded into them as part of their training.

long_desc: A gray shield of the Deathknight has been left here.
short_desc: a gray shield emblazoned with the Black Rose

extra_descs.desc:
It is not a gleaming black color that this armor exhibits, but a dull, flat
black that seems to soak up all color and joy around it.

long_desc: Someone left their black onyx body armor here.

extra_descs.desc:
The Black Rose, the traditional symbol of the Deathknight, proudly adorns the
back of this cape.

long_desc: Some Deathknight left their cape laying here.

extra_descs.desc:
The pommel is in the shape of a wilted black rose, the thorns on the stem
serving as the grip.

long_desc: A Deathknight has left their sword here.
short_desc: the Sword of the Black Rose

extra_descs.desc:
This mean looking weapon looks as if it could do more damage than a bastard
sword.

long_desc: A mean-looking mace with nails studding its length has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
Local lore states that a tribe of merfolk live just off the coast near the
city, and that this fountain was a gift to the people of McGintey by the Lord
of those merfolk.

long_desc: An inticately carved fountain with a naked mermaid in the center sprays a fine geyser of clear water into its basin.
